definition_of_done: no more actionable issues found by reviewer (review-driven loop, not just deterministic-wave convergence)

batches.title: Gate integrity: stale committed agent-context-index.json regenerated
batches.detail: Branch tip failed `npm run check` (check:context) on a clean tree; the convergence run-report commit 3b0ad98 modified a fingerprinted file without regenerating the index, while its own report claimed 'npm run check pass'. Regenerated; gate now green.

batches.title: Round 1 — 6 parallel correctness reviewers (one per subsystem) -> 10 fixes

fixes.issue: blocked lite_advisor mislabeled accepted (substring guard missed real bridge-fail/capacity blocker messages)
doubled provider prefix openai/anthropic/claude for non-implied harness + qualified model
default-mode prompt audit exits 0 on blocked (sibling reuse path already hardened)
active_branch_ids unfiltered vs validator's non-empty-string requirement -> self-reject
latent ValueError in validate_worker_ladder (allowed.index on empty allowed)
unguarded branch['id'] subscript -> crash on malformed manifest
Fix #4 incomplete: same unguarded config.get('effort', {}) at build_model_policies:738,750 -> guarded effort_cfg local
changed_files_from_git silently returned [] on git failure -> now records a blocker (fail-closed, matches siblings)
worker_ownership_violations bypassed when owned_files empty -> fail-closed for role==worker (other roles unchanged)

batches.title: Round 3 — diff-verifier + dedicated fail-open-class re-scan -> CLEAN (DoD reached)
batches.detail: ROUND3-VERIFY: CLEAN and ROUND3-CORE: CLEAN. The one parenthetical reviewer note (extract_changed_files:1394 silent git-status swallow) was traced and determined benign: best-effort failure-evidence/fingerprint helper, git-nonzero already yields [] at worktree_status_lines (check=False), and the authoritative pre-review gate independently re-derives from git and fails closed.

verification.behavior_identity_notes: codex and opencode-bridge are implied-provider harnesses, so the create_goal_config provider fix only affects non-implied harnesses; shipped deepseek/codex profiles unchanged.

warnings: Pre-existing, OUT-OF-SCOPE (repo CI harness, not the goal skillset): 9 ruff F-errors in scripts/check_goal_config_fixtures.py (8x F841) and scripts/check_golden_smoke.py (1x F401). Confirmed identical on clean HEAD; none in changed files; CI ruff step is advisory (continue-on-error). Not fixed — outside the reviewed skills/ surface.

1910 deterministic findings remain documented residuals in .repo-audit/accept.json (hotspot repo-wide churn; idiom-floor complexity; string-literal E501; standalone-script duplication; docs base-path FPs; dependency sibling-import/dev-tool FPs; by-design subprocess + B105/B108 security FPs; 4 vulture dead-code FPs). Spot-checked as legitimate residuals, not concealed fixable bugs.
No commit made: changes left in the working tree on branch opencode-worker-migration pending user decision.
